title: FORECLOSURE AVOIDANCE AND EVICTION PREVENTION - 211info
text: DEVNW OREGON CITY FORECLOSURE AVOIDANCE AND EVICTION PREVENTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Counseling services for those at risk of foreclosure or eviction to find options and solutions to keep their home. Can participate in mediation. 421 High Street Suite 110 Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm Email (503) 655-8974 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 655-8974 Main phone Oregon City (503) 303-4763 FAX Main phone (503) 655-8974 Alternate (541) 345-7106 ext 2060 Ross Kanaga [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to enroll and submit documents or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Application LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm Services: Mortgage Delinquency and Default Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - COMMUNITY LENDINGWORKS COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - INDIVIDUAL DEVELOPMENT ACCOUNTS HOUSING/SHELTER - DOWN PAYMENT ASSISTANCE MONEY MANAGEMENT - FINANCIAL WELLBEING SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
